name: urban-planner-checkpoint
description: Coach urban planner competencies: audit four areas, growth plan, one concrete artifact task — not professional advice

steps.text: Framework: technical, communication, design/strategic, management. Not legal or planning consent advice.

steps.goal: Using skill urban-planner-competencies and knowledge/urban-planning/competencies.md, produce a checkpoint: (1) verdict on strength/gap clusters (2) 1-5 scores across the four competence areas if user evidence exists, else a diagnostic questionnaire (3) 90-day growth plan with one technical + one interpersonal focus (4) single concrete artifact to build this month (5) explicit non-claims. If user mentioned a degree/webinar (e.g. Master of Urban Design), map it with map-programme and do not treat marketing as competence.
criteria: Verdict first on strength and gap clusters
At least one technical and one interpersonal growth focus
One concrete artifact task with verify-how
No invented zoning law or consent approval
Not professional planning advice disclaimer present
